description: Add media proxy endpoint to bypass atob base64 bug

context.summary: wwebjs-api atob bug prevents base64 media sending. Workaround: proxy external URLs through whatsapp-service so wwebjs-api can fetch media directly via MessageMediaFromURL.

design.problem: whatsapp-web.js atob() fails on valid base64 in Puppeteer context. Direct curl with known-good base64 also fails - library-level bug.
design.solution: Add media proxy that fetches external URLs, caches temporarily, serves via internal URL that wwebjs-api can access within Docker network.
design.architecture: n8n/External -> POST /media/proxy {url} -> whatsapp-service fetches+caches -> returns internal URL -> wwebjs-api fetches via MessageMediaFromURL

subtasks.description: Define media cache types and config

context.summary: Define interfaces for cached media entries and proxy config

Export new types from types/index.ts
